resources.string: Gợi ý trang phục hợp mệnh, hợp cung
Nhấn để xem gợi ý trang phục
Nhật Bình – Vẻ đẹp Hoàng triều
Áo Dài Cưới – Sang trọng & Tinh tế
Không có kết nối mạng. Vui lòng thử lại.
Không thể tải dữ liệu. Vui lòng thử lại.
Đăng nhập thất bại. Kiểm tra lại thông tin.
Đăng ký thất bại. Email có thể đã được sử dụng.
Cập nhật thất bại. Vui lòng thử lại.
Đặt hàng thất bại. Vui lòng thử lại.
Cập nhật hồ sơ thành công.
Xin chào! Tôi là trợ lý thời trang Việt Phục. Bạn muốn tìm trang phục hợp mệnh nào?
Leave a message, the TiredCity team will respond as soon as possible to support you.
Tap to view all locations on Google Maps

Opening hours: 9:00 - 22:30 (Mon - Sun)

Mobile: 024 6296 0306

Address: 8 P. Lương Ngọc Quyến, Hàng Buồm, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội. View map
Opening hours: 9:00 - 22:30 (Mon - Sun)
Email: hello@tiredcity.com
Mobile: 024 6296 0306
Learn about TiredCity\'s policies and terms to ensure a safe and meaningful shopping experience.

Order Confirmation Time
After a customer successfully places an order, we will contact you for confirmation within 24 business hours.

Order Conditions
• Customers must provide complete delivery information.
• Phone number and address information must be accurate.
• Orders must be confirmed before delivery proceeds.

Purchase Process
1. Select the desired product.
2. Add the product to the cart.
3. Fill in the delivery information.
4. Choose a payment method.
5. Confirm the order.
6. Receive a confirmation notice from the store.

Note
The store reserves the right to refuse orders with signs of fraud or inaccurate information.

Payment Methods
• Cash on Delivery (COD).
• Bank transfer.
• E-wallets (MoMo, ZaloPay, VNPay…).
• Credit/Debit cards.

Payment Security
• All online transactions are encrypted and secured.
• Customer payment information is not stored without authorization.
• Used payment gateways all meet safety standards.

Refund Policy
• Refunds will be processed after the return request is confirmed.
• Refund processing time is from 05 – 07 business days.

Note
Customers should keep transaction information for verification if needed.

Delivery Time
• Inner City: 01 – 03 business days.
• Suburbs and other provinces: 03 – 07 business days.

Shipping Range
We support nationwide delivery through reputable shipping units.

Shipping Process
1. Order is confirmed.
2. Products are packaged and handed over to the shipping unit.
3. Customer receives order tracking information.
4. Delivery to the registered address.

Note
Delivery time may vary due to weather, holidays, or other objective factors.

Return Period
We accept returns within 07 days from the date the customer receives the product.

Product Return Conditions
• Product is in original condition with tags attached.
• Unused and unwashed.
• Not damaged by the customer.
• Have an invoice or proof of purchase.

Return Process
1. Contact the customer care department.
2. Provide images or videos of the product.
3. Pack and send the product to the store.
4. Receive a new product or a refund as regulated.

Note
Shipping costs incurred during the return process will be handled on a case-by-case basis.

Purpose of Information Collection
• Process orders.
• Support customer care.
• Improve service quality.
• Send promotional information (if the customer agrees).

Scope of Information Use
• Used only for activities related to providing products and services.
• Do not share with third parties without customer consent, except as required by law.

Data Security
• Personal information is stored on a secure system.
• Apply technical measures to prevent unauthorized access.
• Regularly check and upgrade the security system.

Customer Rights
• Request correction or update of personal information.
• Request to stop receiving advertising information.
• Request deletion of personal data according to current regulations.
